beginner.title: Print Numbers from 1 to N
beginner.description: Write a program to print numbers from 1 to N (inclusive).

beginner.title: Sum of Array Elements
beginner.description: Write a program to find the sum of all elements in an array.

beginner.title: Check Even or Odd
beginner.description: Write a program to check if a number is even or odd.

intermediate.title: Check Palindrome String
intermediate.description: Write a function to check if the given string is a palindrome.

intermediate.title: Matrix Row Sum
intermediate.description: Given a matrix, print the sum of each row.

advanced.title: Find Maximum in Matrix
advanced.description: Given a matrix, print the maximum element in the matrix.

advanced.title: String Character Frequency
advanced.description: Given a string, print the frequency of each character.

advanced.title: Matrix Diagonal Difference
advanced.description: Given a square matrix, find the absolute difference of sums of its two diagonals.
